data.title: VeChain appoints initial VeFounders for VeBetter apps, giving full control at 100K users milestone.
data.description: VeChain has chosen two community members to serve as the first VeFounders, responsible for overseeing pre-built decentralized applications. These individuals will receive complete ownership of the dApps once they reach 100,000 users. To learn more, click on the link provided.

data.title: Cold weather boosts stocks, natural gas sees largest one-day gain since Jan 27, 2022. Merger talks added to gains.
data.description: The price of natural gas experienced its most significant single-day increase since January 27, 2022, as a result of cold weather conditions. This surge in value also led to a rally in certain stocks. Additionally, reports of merger discussions contributed to the overall gains observed in the market.

data.title: Canada slashes tariffs on Chinese auto imports, benefitting EV maker BYD. PM Carney cuts duties to boost trade.
data.description: After the Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney reduced import tariffs, BYD, a leading Chinese electric vehicle manufacturer, could potentially enter the Canadian market swiftly. This move significantly impacts the automotive industry and highlights BYD as a key beneficiary of the tariff reduction.

data.title: Cobalt's Microsoft Teams integration now in Microsoft Marketplace for easier deployment. Innovation in offensive security services.
data.description: San Francisco-based company Cobalt, known for its penetration testing as a service (PTaaS) and expertise in offensive security services, has unveiled its Microsoft Teams integration on the Microsoft Marketplace. This platform serves as a one-stop shop for customers seeking cloud solutions, AI apps, and agents. By leveraging this integration, Cobalt clients can conveniently access and implement reliable solutions directly through the Microsoft Marketplace.

data.title: Artera ranked 162 in Deloitte's 2025 Technology Fast 500 list. Several executive appointments announced.
data.description: Based in Santa Barbara, California, Artera.io has been acknowledged as the 162nd fastest-growing company in America. The company specializes in enhancing patient communications through the integration of human and AI agent intelligence. This recognition comes from Deloitte, as Artera.io secures a spot on the esteemed Technology Fast 500 list for the fifth year in a row.

data.title: 20 attorneys from Salvi, Schostok & Pritchard honored by Illinois Super Lawyers, including Top 3 Super Lawyer.
data.description: One of the top managing equity partners, Patrick A. Salvi, has been recognized as one of the top three Super Lawyers in Illinois. Nineteen attorneys from Salvi, Schostok & Pritchard P.C. have received accolades as 2026 "Super Lawyers" and "Rising Stars" by Illinois Super Lawyers. This prestigious honor is bestowed on a select group of legal professionals, with a maximum of five individuals being recognized each year.

data.title: 2025 report shows 50% decline in US listed companies since 1996 peak, highlights SPAC dominance; analyzes 202 IPOs.
data.description: A recent analysis has been conducted on the breakdown of the 202 initial public offerings (IPOs) that were priced in 2025. This report also delves into the long-term patterns regarding market entry and the generation of capital. The information was released from a press release in Chicago on January 20, 2026. Dream Exchange, a group committed to fostering fair opportunities for emerging enterprises to access capital markets, was behind this study.

data.title: IDB Bank names David Park as President of Commercial Banking to boost growth and transformation.
data.description: IDB Bank, the largest Israeli-owned bank in the United States, based in New York, has announced a significant appointment on January 20, 2026. The appointment aims to unify IDB Bank's commercial banking platform nationwide as part of their strategy to support the next phase of growth and transformation. This move is expected to consolidate the bank's operations and enhance its services for customers.

data.title: Reince Priebus joins FOX News Media as political analyst, making his debut on Hannity, 9 PM/ET.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, FOX News Media announced the signing of Reince Priebus as a political analyst, a role in which he will feature on various platforms. His first appearance will be on Hannity on FOX News Channel at 9 PM/ET, alongside Sean Hannity. Priebus, who is currently the President, will now bring his expertise to provide insights on political matters for the network.

data.title: ZKW provides digital Matrix LED headlights for new Audi Q3 in Austria, setting new standards in headlight development.
data.description: In Wieselburg, Austria, on January 20, 2026, the Audi Q3 has introduced cutting-edge headlight technology in collaboration with ZKW, setting a new benchmark in this field. The compact SUV boasts digital Matrix LED headlights as its standout feature. These advanced headlights, co-developed and produced with ZKW, enable unparalleled illumination.

data.title: Leapfrog Acquisition Corp to allow trading of Class A shares and warrants from Jan 26, 2026, post IPO.
data.description: In Summit, New Jersey on January 20, 2026, Leapfrog Acquisition Corporation revealed that starting around Monday, January 26, 2026, investors holding units from the Company's IPO can choose to independently trade the Class A ordinary shares and warrants from the units.

data.title: $250,000 grant available for event marketing by Moab Office of Tourism in Utah to boost local events. Apply now.
data.description: In a recent press release from MOAB, Utah on January 20, 2026, the Moab Office of Tourism revealed a new initiative - a Special Events Marketing Grant. This grant is designed to boost the event scene in the region by providing a dollar-for-dollar match for event marketing expenses. The goal behind this grant is to draw in and improve events that can potentially elevate the local area. Through this funding opportunity, the MOT aims to increase engagement and participation in events, ultimately leading to a more vibrant event landscape.

data.title: Teledyne's detectors launched on NASA's BlackCAT CubeSat aboard SpaceX's ride on January 11, 2026. #Teledyne #NASA
data.description: Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), a prominent provider of advanced imaging solutions, has shared the successful deployment of its cutting-edge Speedster HyViSI Focal Plane Arrays (FPAs) by its Space Imaging division on NASA’s BlackCAT CubeSat Mission. The mission commenced on January 11, 2026, during SpaceX’s “Twilight” rideshare flight. Led by Pennsylvania State University, the BlackCAT mission marks a significant advancement in space imaging technology.

data.title: Hilco Global gives $47.5M loan for Chattanooga's mixed-use development. Loan supports recapitalization.
data.description: Hilco Global's Real Estate Capital practice recently disclosed the provision of a $47.5 million loan for the recapitalization of a vast mixed-use riverfront development in Chattanooga, Tennessee. This initiative aims to support the redevelopment project by providing essential capital for revitalization and expansion.

data.title: Bristol Myers and Microsoft join forces to use AI tool for early lung cancer detection, leveraging FDA-cleared radiology algorithms in over 80% of U.S. hospitals.
data.description: Bristol Myers Squibb Co, a leading U.S. drug company, has joined forces with Microsoft Inc to enhance early detection of lung cancer. Their collaboration aims to speed up the process by utilizing U.S. FDA-cleared radiology AI algorithms available on Microsoft's Precision Imaging Network. This network, widely used by over 80% of hospitals in the U.S., leverages AI technology to automatically scrutinize X-ray and CT scans. This innovation aids radiologists in spotting elusive lung nodules and identifying patients at earlier stages of the disease.

data.title: Michael Mangione appointed as HNTB's New York office leader, a senior vice president with over 30 years of experience.
data.description: Senior Vice President Michael Mangione has been appointed as the leader of the New York office at HNTB, a prominent player in the transportation industry. With over three decades of experience in the field, Mangione will be responsible for driving strategic growth and enhancing client delivery in the region. This move signifies a strategic effort by HNTB to further solidify its presence in New York.

data.title: Kyiv-based Horizon Capital raises over €150m of €300m target for Catalyst Fund, aiming to mobilize €3bn for key sectors in Ukraine.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland, on January 20, 2026, Horizon Capital, a prominent private equity company operating in Emerging Europe, announced an Initial Closing for the Horizon Capital Catalyst Fund (HCCF), a reconstruction-focused fund. With $1.8 billion in assets under management, Horizon Capital successfully secured funding for the Catalyst Fund.
ANTHROPIC SEEKS NEW MANHATTAN OFFICE SPACE AS PART OF NYC EXPANSION

data.title: Crow Holdings reveals 245MW data center in central Dallas with 70MW building expected in late 2027, on 40 acres.
data.description: In Dallas today, Crow Holdings revealed plans for a massive data center campus with a capacity of 245MW. This turnkey project will be situated in central Dallas on a well-connected urban infill site in Texas. The multi-building campus is designed to cater to a variety of user needs, both large and small. The first building, offering 70MW power, is projected to be completed by late 2027. The development is a joint effort with CleanArc Data Centers on a currently empty lot, spanning around 40 acres along the Stemmons C.

data.title: Emergent raises $70M, total $100M, from Khosla Ventures & SoftBank to enable software creation for all; 5M users building.
data.description: A rapidly expanding AI software creation platform based in San Francisco, Emergent, has disclosed the successful completion of its Series B funding round, amassing a total of $70 million. The financial backing was contributed by prominent investors including Khosla Ventures and SoftBank Vision Fund 2, alongside Prosus, Lightspeed, Together, and Y Combinator. This recent funding injection brings Emergent's total raised capital to $100 million in just seven months since its inception. The platform currently boasts over 5 million users actively engaged in constructing full-stack, production-ready web and mobile applications.
